headline: Royal Caribbean and Viking Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after WTI crude crashed 4.7% to $92.94 on Iran-US peace deal progress, providing direct relief to airlines, hotels, cruise lines, and online travel agents. Airlines spend a significant portion of operating costs on jet fuel, so a 5% drop in crude flows almost directly to airline margins.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Royal Caribbean Group, Lowers Price Target to $280
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Jamie Rollo   maintains Royal Caribbean Group (NYSE:RCL) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $310 to $280.
